description: Black Forest Labs has long punched above its weight in the AI image generation space. Its next move? Powering physical AI.

title: Is fake grass a bad idea? The AstroTurf wars are far from over.
description: A rare warm spell in January melted enough snow to uncover Cornell University’s newest athletic field, built for field hockey. title: This AI Wearable From Ex-Apple Engineers Looks Like an iPod Shuffle
description: Two former Apple Vision Pro developers made an AI wearable that only listens when you tap it. They hope to win where other AI gadgets have fumbled: privacy.
